mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show negative mean during rate cuts with p-value greater than 0.05 over 5-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden jump in the unemployment rate above 5.0 percent signals immediate labor market deterioration, triggering negative equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in 70% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad consumer demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase indicates supply chain normalization, which reliably generates positive equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases yield negative 20-day returns in 60% of observations during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL reading above 240 signals accelerating inflation that forces markets to anticipate rapid monetary tightening, producing negative 5-day equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in 65% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 240.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and real GDP confirms synchronized economic expansion, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Synchronized PAYEMS and GDPC1 growth fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a rank IC above 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales during a late-cycle expansion indicate peak consumer spending and impending demand destruction, leading to negative monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: RSAFS declines coincide with positive 20-day returns in 60% of late-cycle observations.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in the index of industrial production reflect strengthening manufacturing activity that consistently supports positive weekly equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO changes yield negative 5-day returns in 55% of cases over a 3-year rolling window.
